description_long: This is a brown bottle with a long, narrow neck and a wider, cylindrical body, typical of beverage or liquor containers. The bottle features a large, white rectangular label that wraps around most of its body, leaving a section on the back without any label. The surface appears smooth and hard, with a matte to slightly glossy finish, and there are no visible signs of damage or wear. The cap is integrated and cylindrical, suggesting a screw cap or similar closure. The bottle is opaque, making it impossible to see any contents inside. There are no visible logos, text, or branding elements on the label.
description: A brown, opaque bottle with a long neck and a large white label wrapping around most of its body. The surface is smooth and undamaged, with a simple cylindrical cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brown bottle with a partial white label visible on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full extent of the large white label wrapping around the bottle's body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with the white label visible on the left side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the brown bottle with no label visible, only the plain surface.
